Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Sep-21-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A., a national banking association's ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY RECEIVER SHOULD NOT BE CONFIRMED.

APPEARANCES: Ivo Keller, Esq. of Buchalter Nemer 777-2727 for pltf & moving party; Robert E. Ormiston, Esq. of Law Office of Robert E. Ormiston 800/214-7990 specially appearing for deft & opposing party Ayman Shehadeh.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. Parties agree to include in order that owner's broker would be allowed to submit an offer to the receiver and to participate in the sale process. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re Temporary Restraining Order

Opposing party to provide department 302 with courtesy copies of its papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
